CONTENT.Club career: Opitz is a youth product of TSV Zarpen, SV Eichede, VfB Lübeck, Hamburger SV, and Werder Bremen. On 20 April 2023, he signed a professional contract with Werder Bremen. He made his senior and professional debut with Werder Bremen as late a substitute in a 4–0 Bundesliga loss to Bayern Munich on 18 August 2023. He signed his first professional contract in early September.
CONTENT.External links: Leon Opitz at SoccerwayLeon Opitz at DFB (also available in German)Leon Opitz at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.International career: Opitz is a youth international for Germany, having played up to the Germany U18s.

SUMMARY: Leon Opitz (born 11 April 2005) is a German professional footballer who plays as a winger for Bundesliga club Werder Bremen.
